_publications._publicationTitle: Systems Biology Approaches Reveal Potential Phenotype-Modifier Genes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: we observed that the SDC2 gene also had its expression altered when NF1 was affected. Furthermore, SDC2 is the first neighbor of NF1, which means both genes share a direct protein–protein interaction.
details: Successfully assembled complex networks integrating HPO ontologies, STRING networks, and GEO expression data, identifying SDC2 as additional candidate with altered expression
